reviews.review_description: What they have failed to mention here is a subscription is required to use anything other than the demo room.  And subscriptions cost $213.00 per month at the cheapest level up to over$800.00 per month.  Definately not for the casual, non-business, user.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. 
You're right — this is a business-focused app, and private spaces are part of a professional subscription. However, our pricing model is different from others: one flat fee gives you your own private space, without paying for each user separately.

We understand this may not be for casual users, but the app itself is free, with no ads, and we offer a free demo space where anyone can meet and explore. More free demo spaces are coming soon.

While we can’t give away private spaces for free, we hope the effort we put into quality and simplicity deserves more than a 1-star rating.

reviews.review_description: It’s beautifully made, but I haven’t seen one person on it. It seems empty, which is unfortunate. ￼

reviews.review_title: Casual VR chat with promising features
reviews.review_description: This one has potential, and looks great for a app lab. Could be used for serious business meeting or some tomfoolery with friends. Cant wait to see a mature version with all the features like screen casting, avatars customization lots of gadgets.
